channel.title: hugo on Linuxo blog
channel.description: Recent content in hugo on Linuxo blog

item.title: Wordpress to Hugo
item.description:
Great text from Christopher Kirk-Nielsen about how to convert blog from Wordpress to Hugo. I recommend reading this to anyone who plans to make the ‘move’ :)

WordPress has a pretty robust architecture that can feel a bit too complex to run a simple blog. @ckirknielsen sheds light on how Hugo can help you create a blog that is simple and fast.

↬ Switching From WordPress To Hugohttps://t.co/ShNqLv2Ca3 pic.twitter.com/o6MriCDR6p

— Smashing Magazine (@smashingmag) May 22, 2019

Actually, this post was published on Smashing Magazine, which happens to be also powered with Hugo. Great !
